title: Artificer's Forge
description: New and unique late game weapons
body:
This mod was made using MCreator.

The goal of this mod is to add as many weapons as I can, for now Im focusing on adding new weapons, but I intend to give each weapon a unique skill.

For now weapons crafts will all be made on the smithing table and require unique smithing templates, these templates can be crafted and will require one netherite ingot each. In the future I do plan on adding a unique crafting mechanic to the mod.

All weapons are compatible with Better Combat.
